panels.description: Wide shot: Young Mowgli, appearing slightly older than a toddler but clearly human, sits confidently among several large wolves (Father Wolf, Mother Wolf, and siblings) in a dense, sun-dappled jungle clearing. The wolves look protective and calm. Focus on the diverse interaction and the lush, detailed jungle environment.

bubbles.text: He grew up with the cubs, though they were grown wolves almost before he was a child.
Father Wolf taught him the language of the jungle—every sound, every rustle, meant something vital.

panels.description: Montage style composition within the panel, split between two actions. Left side: Medium shot of Mowgli sleeping soundly in a patch of warm sunlight on the forest floor. Right side: Medium shot of Mowgli happily swimming in a clear jungle pool, splashing playfully.

bubbles.text: When not learning, he slept in the sun. When he was hot, he swam.
Bagheera even showed him how to climb for honey!

panels.description: Dynamic medium shot, low angle: Mowgli, looking agile and confident for his age, leaps fearlessly between thick, dark green tree branches. Bagheera (a sleek black panther) watches from an adjacent branch with a slight, approving smirk.

Medium close-up: Mowgli sits cross-legged near the base of the Council Rock, intensely staring directly into the eyes of a large, slightly uncomfortable-looking wolf. Sharp sunlight cuts across the scene, highlighting Mowgli's focused, almost playful expression.

bubbles.text: At the Council Rock, he discovered his trick: staring down any wolf until they broke gaze.

panels.description: Close up: Mowgli's hands carefully picking a large thorn or burr out of the paw pad of a resting wolf. The focus is tight on the interaction, showing meticulous care. Soft, caring lighting.

bubbles.text: He also cared for his pack, removing painful thorns.

panels.description: Medium shot: Mowgli crouches low at the edge of the jungle perimeter, looking out at a distant, hazy view of human huts under a dim night sky. Bagheera is visible just behind him, pointing a paw toward a hidden, camouflaged hunter's trap in the foreground.

bubbles.text: Bagheera warned him of the dangers: men and their cunning traps.

panels.description: Low angle, tense wide shot focused on the jungle canopy where the Council Rock would be, though the rock itself is obscured. Akela (old, weak) sits beside a smug, lanky Shere Khan, who is surrounded by a few young, eager wolves. A looming, ominous shadow falls across the scene, suggesting danger.

bubbles.text: Mother Wolf warned him about Shere Khan... but Mowgli, being only a boy, often forgot.
That tiger will kill you one day!
